title: These Google-backed Satellites Could Detect Wildfires Early
summary: Muon Space, which manufactures the craft, says they can detect fires as small as 16 x 16 feet, significantly smaller than existing satellites. Earth Fire Alliance and Muon Space plan for their full constellation to comprise over 50 satellites by 2030.
caption: output/2026-07-19/these-google-backed-satellites-could-detect-wildfires-early.txt
